reviews.review_description: Not so many levels yet but pretty fun to play. Looks good with great movement mechanics. The mountains are a bit glitchy and disappear but apart from that, promising! Looking forward to more levels and further development.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks so much for your feedback and even more thanks for playing!  We have plenty planned so we hope you enjoy!

reviews.review_description: This game was really good! It had very few bugs that are probably being worked right now as the community that they have is really good!! Its short right now but i know they have some really big plans in the future!! They have really unique mechanics in my opinion!! And i overall look forward to seeing this game grow, and best of luck to the amazing devs!

I was so excited for this release just for it to be almost $20, theres only 5 levels that can be finished in almost 5 mins, and theres almost no freedom thats not whats directed to be done. Even tho its only newly released its way too expensive for its quality and gameplay, its not fun to replay and it has so much ai in it like even if your not good at drawing or something ai still isnt good at all. So maybe take some notes and think more about what your doing with your game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, you might be our fastest player so far!

Most players are taking quite a bit longer on their first run, but we hear you on replayability and value. This is an early access release, and we’re planning regular updates with new content.

We’ve got a new level coming soon that’s designed to be highly replayable, so keep an eye out for that.

Appreciate you giving it a try! Keen to hear what you think after the update.

reviews.review_description:
It's  ok just needs more things to do
It fun wish I could escape

reviews.review_title: I am an octopus and I love it.
reviews.review_description: Good fun! Throwing yourself around as an octopus is a good time. I think our scientist friend might be up to something!
Niece and nephew loved playing it. I enjoyed it a bit too but I want to break the tank!
